rulings.Case Title: CHINEDU L. CHUKU et al VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 10. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to July 19, 2012 on Court's own motion. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: 616 MORAGA VENTURE ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. TERENCE ISOBE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 1. Defendant Terence Isobe's Demurrer to Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the first cause of action for intentional misrepresentation. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for concealment. Plaintiff failed to allege a duty to disclose. See Marketing West, Inc v. Sanyo Fisher (1992) 6 Cal.App.4th 603, 612-613. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. GUSTAVO RIOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 9. Motion for Withdrawal of Counsel is granted, subject to opposition. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: DEWOLF REALTY CO.,INC et al VS. JEFFREY NEEDELMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT JEFFREY NEEDELMAN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to July 12, 2012 to be heard by judge Quidachay. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: BAY PROPERTY GROUP VS. JIAN QUAN CHEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Omtion For An Order Compelling Answer To Form Interrogatories And Request For Admissions And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANTs JIAN CHEN and SHU TAN's Motion to Compel Discovery is off calendar per moving party. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: MIKE AGELOPOULOS VS. DAVID JOSEPH TONE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 11. DEFENDANT DAVID TONE's Motion To Compel Discovery is denied. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1345(c). = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL E GUTIERREZ-RANZI VS. RICHARD E SMOKE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT RICHARD SMOKE's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is granted. No opposition filed. Defendant was served with a copy of Complaint that was not identical to the copy filed with the Court. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: SHU JI CAI VS. LARRY WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line DEFENDANT SUZANNE WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is re-calendared for 7/17/12 per 6/21/2012 ex parte order. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: SHU JI CAI VS. LARRY WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT LARRY WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is re-calendared for 7/17/12 per 6/21/2012 ex parte order. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: DIPAK PATEL VS. MIGUEL ESPARZA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT MIGUEL ESPARZA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. "3 Day Notice" is fatally defective. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: HERLINDA SAN JUAN VS. LORNA DUNGO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANTs LORNA DUNGO and JOSE DUNGO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend. Complaint is uncertain as to the existence of landlord-tenant relationship, payment obligations by each defendant, and compliance with SFRO. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET NARRON AS TRUSTEE OF THE NARRON FAMILY VS. CACEY GRAY AKA NIC GRAY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs ROBERT GARRETT and NICK GRAY's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is sustained with leave to amend to allege in good faith compliance with SFRO 37.9(c) on or before June 11, 2012. = (EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: JOSHUA R ZIMMERMANN et al VS. YVONNE CASILLAS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint; Req. For Judicial Ntc And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 3, 2012, line 12. DEFENDANT YVONNE CASILLAS' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is denied. = (EC/501)
